title: Fluffy Grass Block
description: Time to take off those shoes and walk bare feet on some immersive grass.
body:
Feel those pixels tickling your feet with this custom made Grass Block full of fluff! Loaded with some block variations and random rotations a field _looks_ ánd _feels_ as a whole. Even flowers look as a part of this new immersive grass. Make your World(s) matter!

**!! Important note !!** This block is **incompatible** with any "Fancy Grass" mod like Optifine and BetterGrassify. Since the block is already full passively, there is no need for these mods. If you are using one of these mods, make sure to disable (or remove) it! **Also make sure you place this Resource Pack above all other packs modifying world blocks.**
